docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HAU, ALICE I. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHICKLING, ROBERT J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (506)
